title: "provideGraphMessageProviders()"
description: "Build the D495 focused message provider bundle without adding a router or event bus."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build the D495 focused message provider bundle without adding a router or event bus.

## Import

```ts
import { provideGraphMessageProviders } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/microservices";
```

## Signature

```ts
function provideGraphMessageProviders(opts: GraphMessageProviderBundleOptions<THost> = {}): NestProviderBinding<GraphMessageBridge<THost>>[]
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `GraphMessageProviderBundleOptions<THost>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `NestProviderBinding<GraphMessageBridge<THost>>[]` value.

## Example

```ts
import { provideGraphMessageProviders } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/microservices";
```

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs/microservices.ts`
